member_group_no.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

ref_contract_no.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql:
SELECT sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.client_id, sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.seq_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_period, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_installment, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_period, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_installment, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.salary_amount, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ) as grp_con_name, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.intarr_date, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id, sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_desc, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loan_code, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_status_code, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_name, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_shot, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_long, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_paycode, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_last_date,
sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc, (CASE sc_lon_m_rule.not_cal_month WHEN '1' THEN 0 ELSE case when PKA_SRV_DATETIME.fp_MonthsAfter( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_last_date , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date ) > 3 then 1 else 0 end END) as c_loss FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id = sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_id ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loan_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loantype ) and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_balance > 0 and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loan_code in ( '0' ) -- and --( ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.client_id = '000' ) AND -- ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_balance = 14400 OR -- sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_intarr = 12 ) AND -- sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loan_code = '0' ) -- and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date = '01/01/2019' --วันที่ข้อมูล --and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no between '022020' and '022020' --หน่วย -- and sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no = '9' --ประเภท /*WHERE*/
